title: rubus fallacinus
intro: Rubus fallacinus, also known as the fall-bearing raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to its high content of anthocyanins and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus fallacinus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Rubus fallacinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or juice, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
